name: Hailey Austin
description:
Why does the moderation take down my bots one by one?! I get it that I didn't specify age this time and I fixed my mistake, but why can't I just use the old character? I have got a lot of very nice comments I would love to keep showing up at my character, but I guess it's just a wish. I just hope they will get as focused on fixing problems with more problematic bots.

Still sending love to moderation for trying to fix this site <3

Original Description:

As someone requested for just Hailey bot so here it is. It still includes Zander as he is pretty important and stuff.
